node.text:
Eid Mubarak…meethaa mubarak. No aesthetics but how I actually spent Eid at Nani eating kachnarrr gosht and kheer with nan. Elite combo if you have not tried yet…🫠🤍🫶🏻

Also, while having a discussion about politics, I realised how important it is, in the times we live in, to know what’s happening around us. It’s very, very cool to be politically aware, and it’s very “meh” to say, “I am not political.” It’s even cooler to truly understand your religion rather than just inherit it. No matter your age, no matter the day -learn. If it’s Islam, then read. Iqra -the first word of the Quran ..to read; to not simply believe what is told or fed to you, but to read and learn for yourself.

I really hope we learn to vocalise and stand on the right side of history. This is important ..very, very important. Please talk about politics and religion with the same zest as we talk about celebrity gossip, which, from a very insight view , I can tell is not more cool /woke than knowing about world affairs and how they impact us -because they do, each one of us.

Question politics. Question your surroundings. Not out of defiance, but out of a desire to be informed and thoughtful.xx

Querido leitor, espero do fundo do meu intimo que  entenda e venha a fazer ou pensar noq vou  propor. Saiba irmão que o mundo em que vivemos  é cruel e sujo, sujo a tal ponto onde não tem amor,  o amor que só encontramos em Cristo Jesus, sei que  possuem "cristãos" que afastam pessoas de Deus por não fazerem o que Cristo pediu,  tambem sei que pode haver receio por pensar que  a Biblia nos traz sentimento de prisão por ter  muitas regras, mas estas regras é o que nos liberta, pois a Biblia diz para não adulterarmos,  não caluniarmos, não mentir, ela diz para amarmos  um ao outro e por a vai... o mundo diz que pode  adulterar, pode caluniar e mentir por meio de fofocas, que está tudo bem odiar pessoas por mais futil que seja o motivo, vocês não percebem  que só estão fazendo o mal para si e para os outros? Cristo só nos corrige para o bem,  enquanto o mundo nos guia para o mal. As coisas corretas que fazemos está na Biblia e as quais não estão corretas vai contra oq está escrito lá. Então  irmão(a) vá até Cristo, desta vez olha dentro de si  e a sua volta e esteja conciente doq está fazendo,  dos seus erros e se arrependa deles, para que  assim você veja a necessidade de Cristo em sua  vida, isto é, se arrependa, pois é assim que vemos a necessidade de Cristo e depois que tenha  fé com os feitos da trindade( Deus, Cristo, Espirito  Santo), um exemplo: você está doente(pecado), se por ventura n perceber não irá  ao medico(Cristo) e não verá necessidade dele em  sua vida, mas se perceber tal coisa poderá ir ao  medico e assim ele irá te direcionar ou te curar. Saiba que isso não é apenas para o incio com Cristo, mas para vida, nos precisamos  estar cientes de onde estamos e assim ter a consciência que precisamos de  Jesus Cristo em nossas vidas para que ele possa agir. Espero  que essa mensagem venha a mudar você, e saibam que estarei disposto a guiar a qualquer um para o caminho, estarei disposto a ajudar basta me enviar mensagem.

Появился, значит, в Зоне Чёрный сталкер. К лагерю ночью повадился ходить и там сует руку в палатку и говорит: "Водички попить!" А если не дашь хлебнуть из фляжки или наружу полезешь — пришибет! А раз мужик один решил пошутить: вылез тихо из палатки, надел кожаную перчатку и полез к соседям в палатку. Полез, значит, и попрошайничает жалостно: "Водички, водички попить…" А тут из палатки навстречу высовывается рука и за горло его — цап! И сиплый голосок отзывается тихонько: "А тебе моя водичка зачем нужна?!"

owner.full_name: Meem | Mindset, branding & Income with AI

node.text:
300 new followers from posting this content! Thank you for the love 🤍 thought to share it here. 

Back to topic: 

AI is about to create one of the fastest growing types of entrepreneur
And you’re either learning this… or waiting for the next wave.

For the first time ever…
One person can run what used to need a full team.
Not because they work harder.
Because they use leverage.

You don’t need 10 employees anymore.

You need a system. A system that generates you and your clients revenue. 

And this is what that system looks like:
1️⃣ Lead Generation
You use tools like scraping
to find businesses that already need help.

2️⃣ Lead Qualification
You filter who is actually worth talking to.
Not every lead is a good lead.
This saves time.

3️⃣ CRM
You organize everything in one place.
So no leads get lost.
Because lost leads means lost revenue for businesses

4️⃣ Follow-Up Automation
Most businesses lose money here.
Leads come in…
But nobody follows up properly.

So you build systems that:
• send messages
• remind
• nurture

Automatically.

5️⃣ 24/7 Voice Receptionist
When someone calls? They don’t miss it.
Because AI answers it- human like voice - ElevenLabs. 
Handles basic questions.
Books appointments.
Even while you sleep.

Now step back and look at this.
This is what businesses actually want:
• more leads
• faster responses
• no missed opportunities
• more revenue

AI is what builds the system.
Sales is what tells you what to build.

Because if you don’t understand:
• where money is coming from
• where money is being lost

You’re just building random automations.

And random doesn’t get clients hooked on your offer.

I’m executing while sharing my journey. Because confidence is reclaimed through repetition, proximity and consistency. 

Cold calls. Real businesses. Real problems.
While sharing what I learn.

I’m not special.
I’m just someone who started.
And you can do the same.

Here’s the catch, it’s 30 years until AI dominates all gaps. 
 
With the market change and abrupt pacing, so will how systems are built 

Follow Along to see how I automate email outreach to clients -> getting them booked.
Or you'd just meet a vibecoder👀
Hmm hmm nice. Help@me connect with him sister. I need some guidance
I want a friend like that🥲

I have an mvp that’s an cyber incident response platform, a separate ops layer that’s got mitre red team Atomic red team and Caldera, SRE, QA, Perf Eng, Marketing and content all wired to ops spine as CMDB, deployment plane too git, docker, terraform one but click deployment that being set up running on n8n as orchestration engine using ollama qwen 32b, 14b and 7b for automated tasks, mcps and my gmail as ChatBot. All wired to orchestration human in the loop operations 1 man for 10 man team force multiplier. So far mitre frame work wired next is content generation. The only enemy you have is you and fear but anyone can do this.
@ongakawalela in case you are wondering the platform is called incidentbinder.com

@ongakawalela This is genuinely impressive, using n8n as the orchestration spine with local LLMs to run what's effectively a full engineering org solo is exactly the kind of force multiplier most people talk about but don't build. 

The Gmail chatbot as the human in the loop interface is a smart choice , which is low friction, always accessible. Incidentbinder is a strong name for the space. What's the go-to-market angle : are you targeting SMBs who can't afford a full SOC team? and if so- how?
Nice way to attract boys audience😮😮
@meem.recode I am not talking in that sense 😔😮😂
@meem.recode that's what evolution 🧬 gave u .. so good use of . Uhh.. ur things i guess lol😂
@arrrsssshhhh We have a GC if you wanna join
We’re getting opus 4.7 today. Be happy. Celebrate. Call your best friend. Throw a party. Do something
@0xomara Crazy News 🗞️ We want Mythos Preview as well!!
@unzila.web While most adapt to average, outliers redefine the scale. 📐
Hey! I support small business creators with follow-backs because I know the hustle is real 🙌🏻 Let's grow together ♥️
@meem.recode Did it. Now your turn. I am a loyal follower btw. I don't unfollow after 2 days hehe. Check my profile. ❤️
@the_retarded_dev ek hi din hua hai 😢 i know nothing.
@nikhil._.garg ❤️ don’t know when to stop yappjng

postRawData.accessibility_caption: Photo by Pubity on March 22, 2026. May be an image of text that says "TKPH FINLAND SUCCESSFULLY TRANSMITS ELECTRIC POWER THROUGH THE AIR WITHOUT USING PHYSICAL WIRES".

node.text:
Scientists in Finland have successfully transmitted electric power through open air without using physical wires, demonstrating a new generation of contactless energy technologies based on sound, light, and radio waves. 🇫🇮

Researchers from the University of Helsinki and the University of Oulu revealed that controlled electric transmission is possible by shaping the air itself, with the findings disclosed in January 2026 through university research briefings.

It is worth noting that Finland has not developed a full-scale wireless electricity grid capable of replacing power lines, and viral posts claiming electricity moves freely through the air everywhere in Finland are exaggerations.

-

#pubity #viral #interesting
Tesla rolling in his grave lol
Something he did. Than Edison railroaded him

I did a big research project on him back in high school and if I remember properly he already was able to do this in practice. But the head of energy in the fed decided that one man can’t control the entire energy source since he would have full rights to it. I could be mistaken but I think that was the whole story behind it.
Tesla invented this like a hundred years ago
@richie_eyebrows the energy oligarchs and the government have prevented this in order to keep the profits coming. Free electricity would be their end.
@richie_eyebrows Tesla didn’t invent the electricity in the air he discovered it.
@nevika_fsa yeah microwave warfare... and sound warfare
@nevika_fsa nicolas tesla was the biggest scientist ever lived on earth.
@0xsdr they stole this from him he wouldn't be proud he would feel violated
@novelistguy “eLiTe BaLl KnOwLeDgE” but yeah that’s it man
How does it feel to take credit for Tesla's inventions.
America will never allow this because they couldn’t tax it properly.

Wireless electricity still has to come from a power source... trust me if US can tax the common people it will find a way. Property tax would work.
Probably allow for more taxes
They could give them time they’ll find a way to tax anything
Ppl love America lmfaooo out of all the country’s dude got America in his head
So if we combine it with Japanese footsteps tech, that means..people could just be walking around and sending electricity to homes through air!?
We got bluetooth electricity before GTA6
We are the gta 6 in case no one told you. It ain't releasing
We actually got it before even GTA Vice City 💀
And we are still waiting on healthcare
@timbuddytoo get a job that offers it.
In other news, cancer rates in Finland have spiked 3000% 🥴⚡️
It’s very well know that’s a huge misquote. Try watching the full interview. Hilarious you people still latch on to that.
@joey_platinum Nikola Tesla's theory of universal wireless energy pulls electricity from the natural electromagnetic field of the earth... No cancer. Cancer only comes from that 5g shit
Old tartarian technology nothing new here
tricky_gervais well its not completed tech
Sound dumb they killed him and took his work for a reason

@dhondu_chil only took them 125 years to figure out what he was trying to do. Too bad the greedy corporates destroyed his work, and many others, and he died broke. This world has been skewed by capitalism - image what we could've had by now. 🫠
Tesla did it first. It was only shut down because they couldn't bill for it.
@chadruns In 1899, Tesla successfully powered fluorescent lamps from several miles away in Colorado Springs using high-frequency current.
@thephillyreview In 1899, Tesla successfully powered fluorescent lamps from several miles away in Colorado Springs using high-frequency current.
@johno_e3 ikr history is fucked up because of greed
Jim Carey did this as the Riddler in a Batman movie.
Alright where’s the gta 6 comment at
No way so Nikola Tesla was right and did this in the 20th century… crazy
@unkn0wn.frm.317 he didn’t though. He didn’t invent it. He was attempting it and burned through tons of money but never was able to accomplish it😂
@unkn0wn.frm.317 also the government didn’t kill him😂 he was 86 years old. He died decades after the events you’re talking about😂
@tim_kent19 everything u was told was wrong was always right
Awesome!  Back to indigenous power tools.  Welcome home.
Whos going to tell them... this has been achievable since tesla did it.. just some rich guy who owned the wire companies... cough jp morgan cough

@signaturejoinery_co well no s**it sherlock. Tesla did it by lighting numerous bulbs about 40km away. As a side effect, the inhabitants of the area saw sparks and electricity between their legs. Finnish researchers are trying to make it safe in a larger scale, starting tiny ofcourse.
@signaturejoinery_co no need to tell.. we dont even dreaming that system here.
Really? We almost had that in the US 100yrs ago but the folks who started our central bank thought it wouldn't be profitable.

postRawData.accessibility_caption: Photo by NewsBuzz Pakistan on March 24, 2026. May be a meme of one or more people and text that says "NewsBuzz PAKISTAN 17 saal bohat hote hain. Agar aap se Karachi behtar nahi ho raha to kisi aur ko mauqa de dein. Karachi ko behtar karnay ke liye koi koi na koi hal to nikalna hoga. TABISH HASHMI".

node.text:
A strong statement by Tabish Hashmi is making waves, questioning Karachi’s progress after 17 years of leadership. He emphasizes that if meaningful change hasn’t been achieved, others should be given a chance. His message highlights the urgent need for solutions and real improvement in the city. 

#Karachi #TabishHashmi #Pakistan #Change

node.text:
𝐍𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐚𝐥 𝐈𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐏𝐚𝐤𝐢𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐧, 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐫𝐞𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐲𝐞𝐭 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭 𝐦𝐢𝐬𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐭𝐨𝐩𝐢𝐜𝐬 𝐢𝐧 𝐂𝐒𝐒 𝐩𝐫𝐞𝐩. 🇵🇰

If Pakistan is a federation of diverse identities, then the real question is this, how can unity be built without crushing diversity?

𝑻𝒉𝒆𝒔𝒆 𝒏𝒐𝒕𝒆𝒔 𝒃𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒌 𝒅𝒐𝒘𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒕𝒐𝒑𝒊𝒄 𝒊𝒏 𝒂 𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒑𝒆𝒓 𝑪𝑺𝑺 𝒔𝒕𝒚𝒍𝒆, 𝒇𝒓𝒐𝒎:

✨ 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒄𝒆𝒑𝒕 𝒐𝒇 𝒏𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒍 𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒈𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏
✨ 𝒉𝒊𝒔𝒕𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒄𝒂𝒍 𝒃𝒂𝒄𝒌𝒈𝒓𝒐𝒖𝒏𝒅
✨ 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒕𝒊𝒕𝒖𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒂𝒍 𝒇𝒓𝒂𝒎𝒆𝒘𝒐𝒓𝒌
✨ 𝒓𝒐𝒐𝒕 𝒄𝒂𝒖𝒔𝒆𝒔 𝒐𝒇 𝒅𝒊𝒔𝒊𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒈𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏
✨ 𝒄𝒐𝒏𝒕𝒆𝒎𝒑𝒐𝒓𝒂𝒓𝒚 𝒄𝒉𝒂𝒍𝒍𝒆𝒏𝒈𝒆𝒔
✨ 𝒊𝒎𝒑𝒂𝒄𝒕𝒔 𝒐𝒏 𝒔𝒐𝒄𝒊𝒆𝒕𝒚 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒕𝒆
✨ 𝒑𝒓𝒂𝒄𝒕𝒊𝒄𝒂𝒍 𝒓𝒆𝒎𝒆𝒅𝒊𝒂𝒍 𝒎𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒖𝒓𝒆𝒔

This is not the kind of topic you prepare with random points and recycled paragraphs. This topic demands depth, structure, constitutional understanding, current context, and analytical maturity.

If you want to write a high scoring answer on National Integration in Pakistan, then you must move beyond emotional slogans and learn to explain the issue with facts, arguments, and balance.

node.text:
Ye ek comedy movie hai jisme Sacha Baron Cohen ek dictator ka role play karte hain jiska naam Aladeen hota hai. Wo ek fictional country Wadiya ka shasak hota hai aur apni power bachane ke liye kuch bhi kar sakta hai. Jab wo America jata hai, to wahan uski identity change ho jaati hai aur usse ek aam aadmi ki tarah jeena padta hai. Movie me politics, dictatorship aur duniya ke system par funny tareeke se satire kiya gaya hai. Yeh film full comedy, awkward situations aur bold humor se bhari hui hai.
#TheDictator #ComedyMovie #SachaBaronCohen #HollywoodComedy #FunnyMovie PoliticalSatire MovieDescription ComedyScenes
even a gooner would be so confused
@wasreo.zx  I laughed (still laughing), then I looked her up her pics and, you know the rest
My algorithm is so fucking cooked 🤣
pokoknya yg se fllwan trs komen gua like 🤣
Mata gw ternodai, malu bener sebagai cewek, nggak nyangka ada film begini😭🤣🤣
What in the tt did I just watch 😂
@irsanda_cha hajar aku pake punya kamu aku rela babak belurr😭😂
@irsanda_cha boleh ka aku rela di hajar habis habisan😂
@asaak07 ak ngeliatny kerasa dan ngilu bgt anj😭😭
Orantısız güç kullandı bu adil değil 🤣
Baru tau kalo kalahnya di sedot hahaha
Batola uga kek film nian kak 🤣 @florentinavica94

node.text: The image shows a screenshot of an online discussion where a provocative question is followed by a deeply unsettling yet oddly reflective personal story, with a top comment adding dark humor to the situation. Symbolically, it contrasts vulnerability and absurdity — a moment of emotional crisis intertwined with unexpected human behavior. At a deeper level, it highlights how clarity and survival instincts can emerge from chaotic or uncomfortable experiences. Socially, it reflects how the internet turns deeply personal moments into shareable content, often met with humor rather than empathy. Ultimately, it leaves a mixed feeling — reminding us that behind every shocking post is a real human story, far more complex than it appears.
